message:
feat(query): implement statement caching with LRU eviction (bd-2p6v)

Add StatementCache for caching compiled SQL strings:
- LRU eviction when max_size exceeded
- get_or_insert() with lazy builder closure
- Hit counting for monitoring
- cache_key() helper for hashing query components
- Comprehensive unit tests (hit, miss, eviction, LRU ordering)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
